error_signature: modified data not displayed until refresh
title: Modified user data not displayed immediately
symptom: After modifying the current user's first name in Xano, the change does not appear in WeWeb until a manual refresh is performed.
not_this_if: Data is displayed correctly without needing a refresh
root_cause: WeWeb does not automatically refresh the displayed data after modifications are made in Xano. This is likely due to the lack of a data fetching action that would update the UI with the latest information.
fix_steps: Add an action to your workflow to 'Fetch Collection' after modifying user data
Ensure this action is triggered after the modification step
agent_instruction: Add a 'Fetch Collection' action to refresh the modified user data in WeWeb.
